$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the `help_docs` repo (Phase-2, repo #5
after `folders`, `tags`, `text_replacement_rules`, and `prompt_templates`).
One committed file drives BOTH sides of the differential:
- the v4 oracle (build-help-docs-fixture.ts + help-docs-tier2.ts) and
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness help_docs tier-2 test).
THE HEADLINE: this is the FIRST tier-2 repo with a BLOB column. `embedding`
stores a raw Float32 byte buffer (little-endian f32 bytes). v4's
`documentToRow` converts a number[]/Float32Array to a BLOB via
`embeddingToBlob`; an EMPTY array or null is stored as NULL. The canonical
dump emits BLOBs as lowercase hex on BOTH sides, so deterministic embeddings
compare bit-exact.
EMBEDDING VALUES are chosen to be EXACTLY float32-representable so the
f64->f32 cast is lossless and identical on both sides. [0.5,-0.25,0.75,0.125]
encodes little-endian as `0000003f000080be0000403f0000003e`.
BANKED BEHAVIOR: a text-only `update` (content + contentHash) on a row that
HAS an embedding must LEAVE the embedding BLOB untouched. v4's `_update`
rewrites the whole row from the hydrated existing entity (the BLOB
round-trips losslessly); the Rust partial `UPDATE SET` simply never names the
embedding column. The post-update dump must still show the original
embedding hex — op #3 below exercises exactly this.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key, the same one the
folders / tags / text-replacement-rules fixtures use. It is NOT the real
Friday pepper and is safe to commit.
DETERMINISM: every id and timestamp is pinned, so both sides produce
byte-identical post-op state and the canonical dump needs ZERO normalization.

ops.comment: New doc WITH an embedding. Exercises the BLOB insert path: number[] -> little-endian Float32 bytes -> hex `0000003f000080be0000403f0000003e`. id + timestamps pinned.
New doc with NULL embedding. Exercises the empty/null -> SQL NULL path; embedding cell dumps as null.

TEXT-ONLY update on the EMBEDDED seed row `Aurora`: change content + contentHash only. The embedding BLOB must SURVIVE untouched — the post-update dump still shows `0000003f000080be0000403f0000003e`. createdAt preserved, updatedAt pinned.

data.content: Aurora is the dawn engine, rewritten.

ops.comment: Update the NULL-embedding seed row `Prospero`: change title + url. Embedding stays NULL. createdAt preserved, updatedAt pinned.
Delete the NULL-embedding `Carina` doc created above.
